2278310.name: Red List Girls.-Andean Flamingo- Soundtrack
2278310.description:
The original soundtrack for "Red List Girls.-Andean Flamingo" is now available!
A total of 23 BGM tracks, including a full-size version of the opening theme, which is not included in the game.
The composer "hieta.C" himself read the script and composed and arranged the music for the scenes in this work.
Enjoy the profound game sound that accurately represents the atmosphere of the scenario.

data format
WAV:48KHz/24bit
MP3:320kbps
